name: Herbag leather satchel
description:
Product Details: Pink Hermès Toile Herbag Zip 31 Satchel. The Herbag Zip 31
features a canvas body, a flat leather top handle, a flat leather shoulder
strap, a front leather flap with pull-through strap closure, an exterior back
zip pocket, and a detachable interior zip pouch. 9.8" L x 12.2" W x 3.7" D, 3"
drop. Serial number A.

Condition: Pre-owned. Good. Exterior Back Creased, Scratched, Worn. Exterior
Back stained with Other. Exterior Bottom Creased. Exterior Bottom stained with
Other. Lock Scratched. Exterior Corners Worn. Exterior Corners stained with
Other. Exterior Front Creased, Scratched, Worn. Exterior Handle Creased,
Scratched, Worn. Exterior Handle stained with Other. Key Scratched. Interior
Lining stained with Other. Practical Attachment Scratched. Exterior Side stained
with Other. Exterior Top Scratched. Zipper Scratched.
